The world became brighter on this day.
I wish I could hold you today. Since I cannot, I am sending all the love my heart can carry.
እንኳን ተወለድሽ ፍቅሬ ❤️ ዛሬ የአንቺ ቀን ነው።
Birthday girl, you are loved more than this little screen can hold.
Today I hope you feel spoiled by love, wrapped in warmth, and reminded of your worth.
Your birthday deserves flowers, hugs, laughter, soft moments, and every beautiful thing.
I am celebrating you from far away, but please know my heart is very close today.
መልካም ልደት ውዴ። አንቺ ለእኔ በጣም ልዩ ነሽ።
Happy birthday again, my princess. Yes, I will keep saying it. You deserve repetition today.
